content:
STUDY: Zaman | 2023 | meta-analysis of time-restricted eating (TRE) 7-9h and triglycerides reduction
STUDY: Liu | 2023 | TRE meta-analysis with MD -3.08 kg body weight reduction
STUDY: Zeng | 2022 | meta-analysis of TWF/MADF/TRE/IF in 6 metabolic syndrome trials (n=351, 8-16 weeks)
STUDY: Gu | 2022 | meta-analysis of 43 IF studies (sample size up to 2,483)
STUDY: Song | 2025 | systematic review + GRADE meta-analysis of IF in metabolic syndrome (10 RCTs, 701 individuals)
STUDY: Albosta | unknown | comprehensive review of IF disordered eating risk
STUDY: Parvaresh | 2019 | 8-week RCT of modified alternate-day fasting in MetS patients in Iran
STUDY: Li | 2017 | 1-week RCT of IF in T2D patients in Germany
STUDY: Longo | unknown | fasting-mimicking diet foundational research
STUDY: Mattson | unknown | foundational laboratory research on intermittent fasting
STUDY: Zhong | 2024 | AHA EPI/Lifestyle abstract P192 on time-restricted eating and cardiovascular mortality (NHANES 2003-2018)
STUDY: Chen | 2024 | companion to Zhong AHA 2024 TRE cardiovascular mortality analysis
STUDY: Marjot | 2023 | Gut BMJ review on chrononutrition and NAFLD
STUDY: Kerna | 2024 | EJMHR review of detox diets including intermittent fasting
STUDY: Burg-Peet | unknown | Dutch trial-based and lifetime cost-utility analysis of monthly FMD programme in T2D
